faq.question: What is a wood clad?
faq.answer: Doors windows are built around a window frame system, chosen for a balance of appearance, comfort and durability. In practice the choice covers frame construction, glazing package and finish, all of which Deluxe Windows documents in each product proposal.

faq.question: How much should a new front door cost installed?
faq.answer: For doors doors, plan on a range set by frame material, glass and size. Installed Bay Area totals also reflect the frame condition, hardware and finishing, which Deluxe Windows confirms in a written estimate.

faq.question: Which door types does Deluxe Windows install?
faq.answer: Entry, patio, sliding, French and multi-panel doors in fiberglass, wood, wood-clad, steel, vinyl and aluminum, matched to the opening, exposure and security requirements of the home.
